intentSynonyms: create a sharing link in powerpoint
add a sharing link in powerpoint
make a new sharing link in powerpoint
open a new sharing link in powerpoint
create a sharing link for a file in powerpoint
description: Create a sharing link for a file or folder. Supports view-only and edit links with anonymous or organization scope.

item_id.description: Item ID of the file or folder

type.description: Link type — view (read-only), edit (read-write), or embed

scope.description: Link scope — anonymous (anyone) or organization (org members only). Default: anonymous
